name: beaver
description: Beaver — codebase-aware build companion for Claude Code.

plugins.name: beaver
plugins.description: Analyze your codebase into a living convention spec, then plan, build, ship to your working branch via isolated worktrees (or fast-track directly on the current branch), and run the full regression on demand — with inline merge-conflict resolution and convention-guided refactoring, all grounded in that spec. Language-agnostic — including game-engine stacks (Unity, Unreal, ...).
